title: 有馬記念の後に・“1番”のウマ娘！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet conquers the Arima Kinen to
earth-shattering applause.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tears flow as she stands in the Winner's Circle
and basks in the crowd's adoration. She heads to
the awards ceremony with a bright smile on her
face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her name engraved on the hearts of all who
watched her race, she has truly become the
number one Umamusume.
